title: Jamaican Coconut Rice Pilaf
description: A flavorful and aromatic Jamaican-inspired rice pilaf dish infused with coconut and spices.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and sauté until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute, until fragrant.
Add the Carnaroli rice and cook for 1-2 minutes, until lightly toasted.
Add the pilaf rice, Jamaican jerk seasoning, salt, and black pepper. Cook for 1 minute.
Add the coconut milk and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 18-20 minutes, or until the rice is tender and the liquid has been absorbed.
Fluff the rice pilaf with a fork and serve hot.
